keyPoints: AI-assisted pair-work is a complement to human collaboration, preserving human authorship and final decision authority.
Build trust through transparency, explanations, and calibration prompts to sustain cognitive and affective trust over time.
Strengthen social presence with multimodal communication (video, voice, text) to maintain relational warmth.
Assign explicit AI roles (e.g., brainstorming partner, editor, feedback generator) and governance to balance efficiency with shared meaning.
Use longitudinal measures of relationship quality, trust dynamics, and shared mental models alongside performance metrics.
Proactively address ethics, governance, bias, privacy, and ownership with human-in-the-loop checks.
